# Architecture records

> Generated from: `scripts/generate-docs-readme.ts`, `docs/architecture`
> Regenerate with: `pnpm run script:generate-docs-readme`
> Truth class: `derived`
> Do not edit directly.

Architecture ADRs and ATCs grouped under docs/architecture for narrative decisions and enforceable contracts.

## Start here

| Task                           | Start here                     | Why                                                                                      |
| ------------------------------ | ------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Read decision history          | [Open](./adr/README.md)        | ADRs explain what was decided, why it was decided, and the expected consequences.        |
| Check enforceable contracts    | [Open](./atc/README.md)        | ATCs describe architecture surfaces that are bound to checks, evidence, and CI behavior. |
| Understand governance doctrine | [Open](./governance/README.md) | Governance docs explain how architecture, evidence, and CI truth are tied together.      |

## Subcollections

| Collection                                       | Description                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [ADR records](./adr/README.md)                   | Narrative architecture decision records that explain what changed, why it changed, and the expected consequences. |
| [ATC contracts](./atc/README.md)                 | Executable architecture truth contracts for rules that are meant to be enforced, evidenced, and CI-routed.        |
| [Governance](./governance/README.md)             | Governance doctrine, glossary, and generated register for the repo-local governance spine.                        |
| [Scaffolds and templates](./scaffolds/README.md) | Reference templates, blueprints, and implementation packs that support canonical workspace policy.                |

## Related commands

- `pnpm run script:check-architecture-contracts`
- `pnpm run script:check-governance`

## If this area fails in CI

- open `docs/OPERATING_MAP.md` first to see the current CI routing and evidence surfaces
- review the ATC or ADR linked to the failing area before editing checks
- re-run `pnpm run script:check-architecture-contracts` after the fix
